title: Claims Data — Claim FTEs by Client and Delivery Geography
grain: one row per client, with claims-handling headcount (Claim FTEs) split across EXL delivery geographies
summary: A per-client roll-up of claims-handling staff. Each row names a client and gives its total Claim FTEs together with a breakdown of that headcount by delivery geography (India, Philippines, South Africa, US, UK, Colombia) plus a Total. It answers how large each client's claims operation is and where it is delivered.
use_cases: How many Claim FTEs does EXL run for a given client?
Which clients have the largest claims operations? (ranking)
How is a client's claims headcount split across delivery countries? (segment)
Which delivery geography carries the most claims FTEs overall? (aggregation)

columns.name: Client Name
columns.note: client; also contains footer/repeat labels ('Total FTEs', 'Client Name', 'Total')

the 'Client Name' column includes footer/total and repeated-header rows ('Total FTEs', 'Client Name', 'Total')
